artPrompt: An ability dissolving into nothing: a fading cyan glyph sinks beneath the surface of a long beige committee table, swallowed and tabled forever, blank smudged folders scattered across the wood, towering cabinets blurred into ivory mist behind, cold humming light pooling on the empty chairs, a quiet melancholic sense of things permanently deferred, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Motion to Table
text: Counter target activated or triggered ability. The matter is tabled and will be revisited at a later session. (It will not.)
flavorText: "I move that we move that we discuss whether to move." Carried, 1-0.
